Content: Notice number (CP or LTR) | Notice date | Tax year referenced | Amount due (if applicable) | Response deadline

CP14: Balance due - Pay or set up plan | CP2000: Income mismatch - Agree or dispute | CP501-504: Payment reminders - Pay immediately | LT11: Final notice levy - Pay or request CDP | CP75: EITC audit - Submit documentation | Letter 12C: Missing info - Submit within 20 days

1. Ask for exact notice number (top right corner) | 2. Pull up notice on IDRS (ENMOD, TXMOD) | 3. Explain in plain language what IRS is asking | 4. Calculate response deadline from notice date | 5. Explain consequences of non-response | 6. Offer payment plan if balance due | 7. Document call even if information only

Props.Title: Required Fields
Props.Body: Notice number and date | Tax year | Whether taxpayer agrees or disputes | Response deadline communicated | Documentation taxpayer will submit
